home_intro_heading: Expert juristesch Berodung a privat Immobiliegestioun.
home_intro_text: Bei Hargarten Properties gëtt all Transaktioun mat der ganzer Kraaft vun der juristescher Expertise an dem perséinlechen Engagement behandelt. Vun der éischter Berodung bis zur leschter Ënnerschrëft begleede mir Famillen an Investisseuren duerch de Lëtzebuerger Premium-Immobiliëmaart mat Präzisioun, Vertraulechkeet an engem onermiddlechen Bléck fir laangfristege Wäert.
home_coming_soon_text: Eis ausgewielten Premium-Immobilie ginn am Moment virbereet. Kuckt geschwënn nach eng Kéier oder kontaktéiert eis direkt fir en exklusiven fréien Zougang.
home_services_heading: Komplett Expertise, vun der Acquisitioun bis zur juristescher Sécherheet.
about_intro_p1: Hargarten-Properties is a Luxembourgish family office founded by Samuel Hargarten and Laurent Hargarten, both driven by a shared passion for their respective fields.
about_intro_p2: The son, Managing Partner, combines his experience as a real estate advisor, developer, and strategic deal-maker with an instinct for identifying unique opportunities. The father, Partner and a member of the Luxembourg Bar for 30 years, provides the firm with his legal rigor and renowned expertise.
about_intro_p3: A real estate transaction is more than a contract; it is a milestone in the history of a family or a business. Hargarten-Properties safeguards this decisive moment with expertise, discretion, and total commitment.
about_intro_synergy_heading: A Unique Synergy of Real Estate and Law
about_intro_laurent_role: Partner, Member of the Luxembourg Bar
about_intro_body1: We have joined forces to offer a service that is unique in Luxembourg: a seamless blend of market savvy and legal mastery. While one identifies prime opportunities and negotiates the deal, the other secures every legal detail and contract. Together, we provide a high-end, bespoke service defined by safety and sophistication.
about_intro_body2: We offer local market intelligence and a personal touch. Discretion, precision, and tangible results: this is our promise to every client, from private individuals to institutional investors.
about_intro_body3: A father and son working in tandem, providing an agile, boutique experience without the friction of a large firm. At Hargarten-Properties, you have a family partner who truly understands your needs and protects your interests for the long term.
about_story1_text: Mat dräi Joerzéngte Erfarung als Affekot bréngt de Laurent Hargarten en déift Verständnis vu Kontrakter, Verhandlung a wat Clienten wierklech brauchen — an transforméiert juristesch Komplexitéit a Kloerheet a Vertrauen.
about_story2_quote: "Immobilien, dat ass fir d'éischt d'Leit ze verstoen — hir Ambitiounen, hire Liewensstil, hir Zukunft. Déi richteg Immobilie kënnt natierlech duerno."
about_story2_desc: Dem Samuel seng Passioun fir Immobilien gëtt begleet vun enger frëscher Visioun an déifer Maartkenntniss, mat engem intuitiven Sënn fir dat wat eng Immobilie wierklech richteg mécht fir d'Leit déi se hiert Doheem nennen.
about_together_quote: Juristesch Präzisioun trëfft Maartintuioun, zesummen transforméiere mir all Transaktioun an dauerhaft Vertrauen.
about_value1_desc: The foundation of every partnership. We build lasting relationships through transparency, active listening, and reliability.
about_value1_quote: We build partnerships founded on transparency and loyalty.
about_value2_desc: Every project is handled with the highest degree of confidentiality. We guarantee absolute privacy in the management of your transactions and assets.
about_value2_quote: Your projects remain in trusted hands, managed with the utmost confidentiality.
about_value3_desc: Our dual mastery of law and property provides a robust legal framework for every operation, ensuring optimal protection and full regulatory compliance.
about_value3_quote: Our legal expertise reinforces the reliability and security of every real estate transaction.
about_value4_desc: A deep understanding of local dynamics allows us to identify the best opportunities and create long-term value for our clients.
about_value5_desc: Detail is everything. We meticulously analyze every scenario to deliver tailored solutions and accurate, dependable results.
about_value5_quote: A commitment to excellence at every stage of your project.
about_value6_desc: Our goal goes beyond a single transaction; we aim to build lasting connections, supporting our clients through every stage of their real estate journey, now and in the future.
about_process_step1_text: Explore our expertise to see how our dual legal and real estate background can serve your specific goals, whether selling, renting, or investing.
about_process_step2_text: Contact us for an initial, no-obligation discussion. This is a confidential space for you to share your expectations and project vision.
about_process_step3_text: Together, we design the ideal roadmap—whether it involves transaction support, contract drafting, or investment advisory. A plan 100% adapted to your situation.
about_process_step4_text: We work in close collaboration: with rigorous follow-up and informed decision-making, we ensure your project reaches a successful and secure conclusion.
about_process_slogan: Hargarten-Properties: Ären Immobiliebesëtz, ëmmer a sécheren Hänn.
about_cta_text: Vun urbane Penthäiser bis privat Domainer am ganze Lëtzebuerg, all Residenz ausgewielt mat deene selwechte Standarden vu Präzisioun a Suergfalt.
services_intro: Mir bidden eng Rei vu Servicer déi entwéckelt goufen fir Är Aktiven ze sécheren an Äre Liewensstandard ze erhéijen. Eise Fokus läit op juristescher Autoritéit a personaliséierter Betreiung.
services_legal_text: Eis juristesch Abteilung gëtt vu Experten am Lëtzebuerger Immobilierecht geleet. Mir facilitéieren net just Verkaf; mir konzipéieren juristesch solide Ofkommes déi Är Interessen fir Generatioune schützen. All Klausel gëtt gepréift, all Risiko ofgeméildert.
services_cta_heading: All Service verankert duerch eng Residenz déi et wäert ass geschützt ze ginn.
services_cta_text: Eise Portfolio ëmfaasst déi gesichsten Adressen am Lëtzebuerg, ausgewielt mat der selwechter Präzisioun déi mir bei all Mandat bréngen.
contact_intro: Mir leeën e grousse Wäert op Diskrétioun an direkt Kommunikatioun. Kontaktéiert eist Team fir eng privat Berodung iwwer Är Immobiliebedürfnisser.
portfolio_no_match: Keng Immobilie passen op Är aktuell Filteren.
